title: By the Group
editorialSummary: Animals grouped by collective noun. False trail: both dolphins and penguins are highly social and either could plausibly belong to a colony, but dolphins specifically travel in pods. Bats roost in colonies but also form maternity colonies — the item is placed in the colony group, not with flocking birds.

groups.label: Animals That Travel in a Pack
